zh.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾杜德利杜德利 卡素

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Somery於1280年3月2日出生在英國武斯特斯爾時，他的父親Roger de Somery III24歲，母親Lady Agnes Lucia25歲。他於1318年之前與Lucy de Grey在英國英格蘭德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1322年7月1日在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利杜德利 卡素享年42歲。

zh-hans.Dudley Castle, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾杜德利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Somery于1280年3月2日出生在英国武斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Roger de Somery III24岁，母亲Lady Agnes Lucia25岁。他于1318年之前与Lucy de Grey在英国英格兰德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1322年7月1日在英国武斯特斯爾杜德利杜德利 卡素享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Somery was born on 2 March 1280, in Worcestershire, England, his father, Roger de Somery III, was 24 and his mother, Lady Agnes Lucia, was 25. He married Lucy de Grey before 1318, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 1 July 1322, in Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Somery est né le 2 mars 1280, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Somery III, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Lucia, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lucy de Grey avant 1318, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 1 juillet 1322, à Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Somery am 2. März 1280 in Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Somery III 24 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes Lucia 25. Er hat vor 1318 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Lucy de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 1. Juli 1322 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Somery è nato il il 2 marzo 1280 nel Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Somery III, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes Lucia, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lucy de Grey prima del 1318, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 1 luglio 1322, nel Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Someryが1280年3月2日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger de Somery IIIは24歳，母Lady Agnes Luciaは25歳であった。1318年以前にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアでLucy de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1322年7月1日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーダドリー カストルで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Somery(이)가 1280년 3월 2일 영국 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Somery III(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Lucia(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1318년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 Lucy de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1322년 7월 1일 영국 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.2 March 1280–1 July 1322: 2 de março de 1280–1 de julho de 1322
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Somery nasceu em 2 de março de 1280, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Somery III, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Lucia, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy de Grey antes 1318, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1 de julho de 1322, em Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Somery родился 2 марта 1280 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Somery III было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Lucia, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy de Grey перед 1318 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 1 июля 1322 г. в местности дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.2 March 1280–1 July 1322: 2 de marzo de 1280–1 de julio de 1322
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Somery nació el 2 de marzo de 1280, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Somery III, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Lucia, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lucy de Grey antes de 1318, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 1 de julio de 1322, en Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años.
